description: CompositionBlue sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester fleece, has a hood with drawstrings, full sleeves with embroidered branding on both sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, NBA graphic print and appliqué on the chest and a pouch pocket on the front FitComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsProudly display your appreciation of the NBA with this bright hooded sweatshirt from adidas.  Whether you play Basketball yourself or just love watching the game, this hoodie is for you.  The cotton blend fabric has a fleecy back making is soft and cosy next to you skin. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
